---
title: "Welcome"
css: styles.css
---

As an Economics student at the University of St. Gallen (HSG) with a specialization in Data Science, I am interested in how data can support smarter business decisions. I enjoy learning new data science tools and exploring their connections to business and entrepreneurship, and I am eager to continue learning in this direction through my studies, projects, and internships.

This website showcases selected academic and personal projects that reflect my learning journey. Visit my recent projects below: 

#### Data & Visualisation
-   [Mapping My Runs with the Strava API](Strava_quarto_publish.qmd) – What do my 2025 runs look like on a map?
-   [Delta Efficiency Audit](delta.qmd) - Auditing Delta's operations with four years of flight data

#### Machine Learning
-   [Predicting Geneva's Public Transport Demand](DSF_quarto_publish.qmd) – Can ML predict when the bus gets crowded, across an entire city?

#### Web Application
-   [Start Hackathon 2026](Hackathon.qmd) – Ranked 2nd: a game that teaches people to invest, built in 36 hours
